description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden toolbox reinforced with wide, black metal bands running vertically and horizontally along its edges and surfaces. The wood is aged, with visible scratches, dents, and a large patch of worn or missing finish on the lid, suggesting heavy use and exposure to the elements. A prominent metal latch is mounted on the front, designed to secure the lid, and there is a visible area of damage or repair on the front face. The corners and edges are protected by metal brackets, adding to the object's durability and rugged appearance. The box appears solid and heavy, with no visible handles for carrying, and the construction suggests it is intended for storing or transporting tools or equipment. The overall look is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, weathered wooden toolbox reinforced with black metal bands and a central metal latch, showing signs of heavy use and age.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main latch, a patch of damage or repair on the wood, and the most worn area on the lid.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side and front, with visible metal bands and the worn lid surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wooden surface and metal bands, with no latch or handle visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the side and back, with the worn lid and reinforced metal corners.
attribute_handle_type: none visible; no external carrying handle is present on any side of the box.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front-mounted steel clasp latch, rectangular in shape, designed to secure the lid; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no trays, drawers, or dividers are visible or suggested by the exterior.
